title: eryngium cuneifolium
intro: Eryngium cuneifolium, also known as Rattlesnake Master, is a flowering plant in the carrot family native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Eryngium cuneifolium is also known to have health benefits like reducing fever and relieving pain, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
